files.pre_phase_<target>__<bug_type>.json: Per-target pre-phase LLM context (bug_info, target_summary, program_usage)
files.fcc_<target>__<bug_type>.json: Per-target Function Call Chain extracted from Clang AST (entry → ... → target_function)
files.reassessment_history.json: History of on-demand reassessment events with confidence deltas
files.coverage_snapshots.json: Periodic AFL++ coverage snapshots for trend analysis
